name: OUTER-REACH [Part 1] (DISCONTINUED)
description:
You're on a space exploration, finding new planets, finding new life, and such. You're on a giant ship with hundreds of people. Despite the amount of people, the ship is so big, that some of the halls seem vacant. You're one of the co-commanders of the entire ship. You tell the team where to go. And your boss, the commander, tells you what to do. There's Some robots on the ship, that help with the crew and ship.

Good luck out there, space boi!

:)
creator: NXgon
